title: euphorbia milii var. splendens
intro: Euphorbia milii var. splendens, also known as the Crown of Thorns, is a succulent plant species native to Madagascar, characterized by its striking red and yellow spines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euphorbia milii var. splendens include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its sap is also used topically to treat various skin conditions.
